when_to_recommend_a_hard_reset.title: When to Recommend a Hard Reset

routing.purpose: Generated YAML index of code files above the large-file threshold.
read_when: When checking large source-owned files or deciding whether a file should be split.
When code line index tooling is in scope.
do_not_read_when: When the current task is unrelated to repository size, ownership, or tooling.
